title: UnderControl Workspace Prompt
description: Schema for workspace prompt entities. Prompts are short instruction templates used in workspace sessions to direct AI agents. They support {{taskId}} variable substitution and are displayed as quick-action buttons in the workspace UI. Prompts are group-scoped and stored in the database.

id.description: Prompt UUID. Present = existing prompt (update). Absent = new prompt (create).

label.description: Display name shown in the workspace UI. Free-form text (not a slug). Examples: 'Run Tests', '开始实现', 'Refine Requirements'.

icon.description: Lucide icon name for UI display. Examples: 'Play', 'FileSearch', 'ClipboardCheck', 'Wrench', 'TerminalSquare'.

template.description: Prompt template text. Supports {{taskId}} placeholder which is replaced with the actual task ID at invocation time. This is the instruction sent to the AI agent when the prompt is selected.

metadata.description: Extensible key-value store. Reserved for future use.

is_builtin.description: true = system built-in prompt (seeded on first run, cannot be modified or deleted). false = user-created prompt.

group_id.description: Group this prompt belongs to. All prompts are group-scoped.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp (ISO 8601). Updated by server.

prompt_vs_skill.description: Prompts and Skills are distinct concepts. A Prompt is a short workspace instruction template (e.g., 'Implement task {{taskId}}') shown as quick-action buttons. A Skill is a full capability definition in markdown, consumed via 'ud prompt <name>' on the CLI. Prompts live in the workspace UI; Skills live in the CLI/agent ecosystem.

template_variables.description: The template field supports variable substitution. Currently supported: {{taskId}} — replaced with the active task's UUID at invocation time. Variables use double-brace syntax.

built_in_prompts.description: Three built-in prompts are seeded on first run: 'Start Implementation' (icon: Play), 'Refine Requirements' (icon: FileSearch), 'Check Implementation' (icon: ClipboardCheck). These cannot be modified or deleted by users.
